positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a majestic, symmetrical mountain range viewed from below at sunrise. The composition should be clean and bold, utilizing silhouettes of pine trees and jagged peaks against a vibrant gradient sky of deep indigo merging into warm apricot and gold. Include geometric, minimalist decorative elements (like repeating hexagonal patterns or stylized sunbursts) framing the main landscape. Vector art style, strong graphic novel feel, limited color palette for printability, optimal for t-shirt printing, central focus, dramatic lighting, clean lines, flat design elements.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logos, noisy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, grayscale, realistic photography
